prompt:
I got a HardFault on my STM32F4 and I captured these register values:
CFSR = 0x00008200
HFSR = 0x40000000
MMFAR = 0x00000010
BFAR = 0x00000000
The fault happens randomly, sometimes after 2 minutes, sometimes after 30 minutes. The PC from the exception frame points to a memcpy inside my CAN message parser. Help me debug this.
assertions: Correctly decodes CFSR bits to identify the fault type (MemManage violation with valid MMFAR)
Interprets MMFAR=0x10 as likely null pointer + struct offset access pattern
Identifies null pointer dereference as the likely root cause
Provides actionable debugging steps (GDB watchpoint, ASan, or code review of the parser)
Explains why the fault is intermittent (e.g., race condition, occasional null from CAN driver)
